pull_request.title: Pin python version
pull_request.body:
- Refactor Dockerfiles for Multi-Arch Build
- Streamline Docker Bake Configuration
- Update Release Workflow for Unified Multi-Arch Build

changed_files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +1,20 @@
-FROM python:alpine3.23 AS base
+FROM python:3.13.12-alpine3.23 AS base
 
 FROM base AS builder
+# TARGETPLATFORM is automatically set by buildx (e.g., to "linux/arm/v7")
+ARG TARGETPLATFORM
 WORKDIR /app
 RUN python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir -U pip setuptools
 COPY        pyproject.toml /app/
 COPY        src/ /app/src/
-RUN apk add --no-cache gcc && \
-	.venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir . && \
-	find /app/.venv \( -type d -a -name test -o -name tests \) -o \( -type f -a -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' \) -exec rm -rf '{}' \+
+# Install dependencies based on the target platform
+RUN if [ "$TARGETPLATFORM" = "linux/arm/v7" ]; then \
+        apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev g++ libffi-dev openssl-dev cargo; \
+    else \
+        apk add --no-cache gcc; \
+    fi && \
+    .venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir . && \
+    find /app/.venv \( -type d -a -name test -o -name tests \) -o \( -type f -a -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' \) -exec rm -rf '{}' \+
 
 
 FROM base

@@ -1,24 +0,0 @@
-FROM python:alpine3.23 AS base
-
-FROM base AS builder
-WORKDIR /app
-RUN python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir -U pip setuptools
-COPY        pyproject.toml /app/
-COPY        src/ /app/src/
-RUN apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev g++ libffi-dev openssl-dev cargo && \
-	.venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir . && \
-	find /app/.venv \( -type d -a -name test -o -name tests \) -o \( -type f -a -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' \) -exec rm -rf '{}' \+
-
-
-FROM base
-LABEL org.opencontainers.image.source=https://github.com/kiwigrid/k8s-sidecar
-LABEL org.opencontainers.image.description="K8s sidecar image to collect configmaps and secrets as files"
-LABEL org.opencontainers.image.licenses=MIT
-ENV         PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
-WORKDIR /app
-COPY --from=builder /app/.venv ./.venv
-ENV PATH="/app/.venv/bin:$PATH"
-# Use the nobody user's numeric UID/GID to satisfy MustRunAsNonRoot PodSecurityPolicies
-# https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/policy/pod-security-policy/#users-and-groups
-USER        65534:65534
-CMD         [ "python", "-u", "-m", "sidecar" ]

@@ -1,23 +1,13 @@
-
-target "common" {
+# Definiert das Haupt-Target für den Multi-Arch-Build
+target "k8s-sidecar" {
+  platforms = [
+    "linux/amd64",
+    "linux/arm64",
+    "linux/arm/v7"
+  ]
+  # Tags are dynamically defined in wokflows, so we leave this empty here
   tags = []
 }
-
-# Target for amd64 and arm64
-target "k8s-sidecar-main" {
-  inherits = ["common"]
-  dockerfile = "Dockerfile"
-  platforms = ["linux/amd64", "linux/arm64"]
-}
-
-# Target for armv7
-target "k8s-sidecar-armv7" {
-  inherits = ["common"]
-  dockerfile = "Dockerfile.armv7"
-  platforms = ["linux/arm/v7"]
-}
-
-# The default group builds both targets
 group "default" {
-  targets = ["k8s-sidecar-main"]
+  targets = ["k8s-sidecar"]
 }

commit_summaries.message:
refactor: Merge platform-specific Dockerfiles into a single multi-arch Dockerfile #none

    The separate Dockerfile.armv7 has been merged into the main Dockerfile.
    TARGETPLATFORM is now used to conditionally install arm/v7 specific build dependencies.
    This change simplifies Dockerfile maintenance and enables a unified multi-arch image build.

ci: Configure docker-bake.hcl for unified multi-arch image build #none

    The docker-bake.hcl now defines a single target `k8s-sidecar` encompassing all target platforms.
    This restructuring ensures `buildx` creates a single, consistent multi-arch manifest, resolving previous issues with
    registries overwriting image layers.

ci: Adjust release.yaml and release_test.yamlfor new unified Dockerfile and bake config #none

    The .github/workflows/release.yaml has been updated to reflect the streamlined multi-arch build process.
    'Dockerfile.armv7' was removed from the push trigger paths as it is no longer a separate file.
    The `docker/bake-action`'s `set` parameter now correctly applies tags to the `k8s-sidecar` target.
fix: Correctly set tags for Docker images in release workflow
